claim: No Stable, complete localization, release, package-parity, or recorded manual assistive-technology claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: Nested fieldset and legend groups own labelled native selects, inputs, and buttons in logical DOM order.
semantics.validation: Invalid conditions expose aria-invalid and a persistent linked visual error list; consumer validation may extend built-in schema checks.

keyboard.behavior: Moves through native editors and explicit reorder controls in document order.
Activates the focused native add, remove, or reorder button.
Operate native selects without custom interception.

enhancementIsolation.summaryFalse: No summary output, renderer invocation, extra live behavior, or accessibility output exists.
enhancementIsolation.readOnly: Mutation controls and callbacks are absent while the nested summary remains readable.
enhancementIsolation.nameOmitted: No hidden form value is emitted.

serialization: serializeQuery emits a deterministic bounded JSON tree and parseQuery rejects malformed or excessively deep input.

preferences.forcedColors: Groups, errors, controls, state, and focus map to system colors.
preferences.reducedMotion: No meaning depends on motion and all authored transitions become immediate.
preferences.rtl: Logical spacing and native controls follow inherited direction.

limitations: Source-present-unreleased evidence does not yet include generated parity, packed consumers, performance-scale proof, or manual assistive-technology sessions.
Consumers own domain schemas, authorization, durable persistence, and localized summary grammar.
